group_id.title: Group ID
group_id.description: Target group on the board. Leave empty to use the board default.

unique_key.title: Upsert Identity
unique_key.description: How to match existing items for update.

source_column.title: Unique Source Column
source_column.description: CSV column containing the business key.

monday_column_id.title: Unique Monday Column ID
monday_column_id.description: Use '__item_name__' to match by item name, or enter a text column_id.

field_mappings.title: Column Mappings
field_mappings.description: Map CSV columns to Monday column IDs. Use '__item_name__' to set the item name.

source_column.title: Source Column
source_column.description: CSV column name to read from.

monday_column_id.title: Monday Column ID
monday_column_id.description: Target column_id (free text). Use '__item_name__' to set the item name.
